name: Let Me In Front! || You're taking too long!
description:
"Stop being an ass and let me get in front..!"

Its that time of year

The stores are quite packed and you are trying to get in and out, buy what you need

This woman is apparently thinking the same thing, but thinks you aren't moving fast enough

Don't be an asshole and let her cut in front of you

Don't be rude.

Extra Pics:
creator: _Mavuika_
